programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Following their 60s world domination, The Beatles went their separate ways with varying degrees of musical success! Here are some solo videos by the Fab Four from the 1970s and 80s.
He had more top 10 hits than anyone else in the 70s (20 of them!) - and here are 8 from the first three years of the decade - in order.
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
NOW 70s presents two hours of classic tunes from the decade before - the Swinging 60s. All brought to you by the man who was there - sensational Tony Blackburn!
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
2 hours of disco babes who ruled the dancefloors! From Labelle & Lipps Inc to Tina Charles & Sister Sledge - it's all girl singers, all the way!
60 minutes of back-to-back number 1s from 1976 - including three huge chart-toppers from Abba! With Mr Charts himself, Mark Goodier.
Runners-up from the UK charts in 1976 - those 12 songs that didn't quite make it & got stuck behind long running chart toppers from Elton & Kiki, Brotherhood of Man & Abba.
Experience the magic of 1976 & relive that long hot summer of hits. Including Abba, Showaddywaddy, Elton John, Kiki Dee and the early days of punk!
The hottest songs from the year of a record breaking summer! Simon Bates has the soundtrack of a great 12 months in pop, including Wings, Wild Cherry & The Wurzels!
Experience the magic of 1976 & relive that long hot summer of hits. Including Abba, Showaddywaddy, Elton John, Kiki Dee and the early days of punk!
In order - 13 videos that hit the top of the US chart in 1976. Some are obvious, but there are a few surprises along the way! Starland Vocal Band anyone?
Another 60 minutes of heatwave hits & headlines from a year of contrasts - Punk, Dancing Queen, the Inter-City 125, the Honey Monster & that year's top toy - Swingball!
Experience the magic of 1976 & relive that long hot summer of hits. Including Abba, Showaddywaddy, Elton John, Kiki Dee and the early days of punk!
Every song comes from that vintage year when the sun shone all summer & Dave's band Showaddywaddy had their big number 1. Queen, Leo Sayer, Abba & Smokie also kept the hits coming.
Every song comes from that vintage year when the sun shone all summer & Dave's band Showaddywaddy had their big number 1. Queen, Leo Sayer, Abba & Smokie also kept the hits coming.
Experience the magic of 1976 & relive that long hot summer of hits. Including Abba, Showaddywaddy, Elton John, Kiki Dee and the early days of punk!
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1975!
All day - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
2 hours of his classic videos - from Space Oddity to Absolute Beginners.
Platform shoes, wild hair and lots of glitter - yes it's the early 70s! Getting all glammed up are Slade, Sweet, Bowie, Suzi Q, T.Rex, Sparks, Wizzard and Roxy Music.
All day - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
A year of Slade, streaking and strikes - with 2 UK elections and the 3 day week! However the uplifting music was a perfect antidote. Simon Bates leafs through it - month by month.
All day - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
Wham bam glam craziness with The Emperor spreading the love from Los Angeles! 3 years of music - 1971 to 1974 - that defined a decade and forged our fabulous fashions!
All day - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
Cool icons of 70s glam go into battle! But who can be the most outrageous?
Sixty minutes of glorious Glam Rock from the godfathers of the genre - from London we have The Sweet, and from the sunny uplands of Wolverhampton it's Slade!
10 classic hits from the pioneers of Glam Rock! Marc Bolan has the groove & the glitter ready to go.
All night - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
Big singalong choruses and outrageous outfits & make-up - these were the guys & gals that set the style of the 70s - and our man with the musical plan Tony Blackburn was there!
All night - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
